title: Autumn Leaf
description: Improves the appearance of leaves with high mod compatibility and performance, with an autumn style!
body:
This lightweight resource pack transforms your world with a stunning autumn theme while preserving the default aesthetic. For a version with a spooky twist.


![Before/After](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e80313f2be99dca61506d9c8d2b02ef41d397dbc.png)


### What's Inside:  
- Vibrant red, orange, and yellow leaves  
- Fallen leaves scattered on the grass  
- Warmer, golden-toned grass 
- Heavily inspired by [Default-Style Fall Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/default-style-fall-pack)
- Support me on **paypal**  

![3.0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/81ff5eb39f18a0938772a835cb524f72dca2afe4.png)
![2.0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b279cf5992397d9f8f02849fe01c8e94f569e60.png)

### Preview:  
- Before/After
- Autumn Leaf With Cool Shaders
- Autumn Leaves with Fallen leaves scattered on the grass
- Looks super cool in Scary mods


![1.0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f2b25e3d1bc496f37a14f267270214ce72a7752.png)

### Recommended Pairings:  
Enhance your autumn experience with these resource packs and client-side mods. 



- **[Mod][Fabric] Falling Leaves** – Adds beautifully animated falling leaves, perfectly complementing the fall aesthetic.
